$curated: Slot bindings for theme — the FE-side truth for the one keyed MxCard node (theme/preview) in theme.gen.json, cross-checked live by test/presentation/features/personalization/theme_parity_test.dart. `role` is the MxTextRole the FE renders; `bind` is the source (l10n: = an ARB UI-copy key). Curated from theme.slots.skeleton.json: the FE preview card (theme_screen.dart _Preview) renders MxText.title (titleMedium) + MxText.body (bodyMedium), bound to l10n.themePreview / l10n.themePreviewBody — NOT the kit mock's 학교/school/Study now/PREVIEW sample copy (a CONTENT divergence documented in intent-ledger). The preview card is also MxCardVariant.flat (a VARIANT divergence vs the kit's elevated — see intent-ledger exceptionKind:variant; the parity test reads that to assert flat). Non-MxCard skeleton nodes (heads / segmented controls) dropped — Template A loops only MxCard. State scope: the preview renders identically across all 3 ThemePrefs states.
